message:
feat(core,vdbe): add JIT scaffold with hot-query tracking, PRAGMA controls, and SQL correctness fixes

Implement the VDBE JIT compilation scaffold (bd-1rw.3) with full
hot-query lifecycle: execution counting, threshold-based triggering,
LRU code-cache with configurable capacity, and interpreter fallback
when unsupported opcodes are present.

VDBE engine (engine.rs):
- Add JitRuntimeState with per-plan execution counting, LRU-evicting
  code cache (HashMap + VecDeque), and atomic metrics counters for
  compilations, failures, triggers, cache hits, and cache misses
- Implement FNV-1a plan hashing over opcode stream for cache keying
- Add compile_jit_stub() opcode eligibility filter and stub compiler
- Integrate maybe_trigger_jit() into VdbeEngine::execute() with
  structured tracing at debug/info/warn levels per JitDecision variant
- Wire reset_vdbe_jit_metrics() into existing reset_vdbe_metrics()
- Export public API: set/get functions for enabled flag, hot threshold,
  cache capacity, plus metrics snapshot and reset
- Add unit tests: compile + cache-hit metrics verification, and
  compile-failure fallback with unsupported opcodes (OpenRead/Column)

Connection layer (connection.rs):
- Add PRAGMA surface for JIT controls: jit_enable, jit_hot_threshold,
  jit_cache_capacity (read/write), jit_stats (10-row metrics table),
  jit_reset (clear all state)
- Fix INTERSECT compound op to deduplicate results per SQL standard
  (previously returned duplicate rows from left arm)
- Fix EXCEPT compound op to deduplicate results per SQL standard
- Fix SELECT * / TableStar ORDER BY resolution: expand Star and
  TableStar into explicit column references before passing to
  sort_rows_by_order_terms, fixing positional and named ORDER BY
  with JOIN queries
- Fix compile_expression_select IfNot p2 flag (0 -> 1) for correct
  NULL short-circuit semantics in subquery predicates
- Replace silent Null fallback in eval_join_expr with explicit
  NotImplemented error for unsupported expression types
- Add unit tests for ORDER BY with Star+JOIN and INTERSECT/EXCEPT
  deduplication, plus PRAGMA JIT controls integration test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
